planets.name: Really
planets.summary: Archive cluster around really: 7230 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2024-10-23
artifacts.excerpt:
The healthiest relationships (platonic, romantic, collaborative, etc) I’ve observed are amongst those people who are committed to being comfortable with their own and each other’s discomfort to the point that what could be called “conflict” isn’t actually that uncomfortable.

1/ https://t.co/yp6ExbGsVv

artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2024-10-23
artifacts.excerpt:

artifacts.title: Good receipt from 2024-10-25
